description: Hardware-in-the-loop demo: plant model + dual STM32/emulated flight controllers

components.name: Executive
components.notes: System executive. Health via GET_HEALTH (opcode 0x0001). See ExecutiveHealthPacket in docs.

components.name: HilPlantModel
components.notes: 1-DOF vertical flight plant model. TUNABLE_PARAM for mass/drag/control gains.

components.name: HilDriver (STM32)
components.notes: Real STM32 flight controller via /dev/ttyACM0. STATE is read-only.

components.name: HilDriver (Emulated)
components.notes: Software-emulated flight controller via PTY. Same STATE layout as STM32 driver.

components.name: HilComparator
components.notes: Compares real vs emulated driver outputs. TUNABLE_PARAM for divergence threshold.

components.name: SystemMonitor
components.notes: CPU/memory/GPU health monitor. Base telemetry only in this release.

wireProtocol.description: SLIP-framed structs on UART between host and STM32

systemOpcodes.description: System opcodes (0x0000-0x00FF) are handled by ApexInterface. Executive opcodes (0x0100+) are routed to fullUid=0x000000.

executive.0x0114: CMD_LOCK - lock component for update (4B fullUid)
executive.0x0116: CMD_SLEEP - sleep mode (clock ticks, tasks paused)
executive.0x0130: INSPECT - read registered data (9B: u32 fullUid, u8 category, u16 offset, u16 len)

inspectCategories.3: INPUT - external data fed to component

stateDataAccess: Read-only via INSPECT (opcode 0x0130). Use JSON struct dictionaries to interpret raw bytes.
